risks.description: Conflicts in Ukraine and Middle East, intensified trade barriers, and assertive industrial policies (EU/China/USA) disrupt supply chains, increase costs, and weaken project economics.

risks.risk_title: Project execution delays and quality issues
risks.description: Complex offshore projects face coordination challenges, scaling difficulties, and logistical disruptions leading to delays, cost overruns, and reputational damage.
mitigation: Continuous alignment between commercial and delivery teams

risks.description: Evolving cyber actors target Vestas’ digital assets, critical infrastructure, and energy solutions for extortion or destabilization, risking economic loss and reputational harm.
mitigation: Supplier coordination for timely component availability
